requirement_topic.en: AERS / EMS Connection and Acceptance Review

summary.en: Serbian solar projects typically need connection approval and acceptance steps through AERS and the relevant EMS procedures. The inverter is reviewed in the project grid-connection file and by the distribution operator for technical settings, metering, communication, commissioning, and acceptance. Product test reports do not replace operator approval and project acceptance conditions.
summary.zh: 塞尔维亚光伏项目通常需通过AERS及相关EMS流程完成并网批准和验收。逆变器在项目并网文件及配电运营方文件中接受技术设置、计量、通信、调试和验收审查。产品测试报告不能替代运营方批准或项目验收条件。
summary.zht: 塞爾維亞太陽能項目通常需透過AERS及相關EMS流程完成併網批准和驗收。逆變器在項目併網文件及配電營運方文件中接受技術設置、計量、通訊、調試和驗收審查。產品測試報告不能替代營運方批准或項目驗收條件。

standards_or_laws: Serbian electricity market connection procedures for distributed generation
EMS interconnection and acceptance rules for distribution connection points

summary.en: China GB/T 19964-2024 and GB/T 37408 are useful technical baselines for grid compliance. They can assist clause comparison, but Serbian interconnection approval depends on the specific AERS and EMS route for each project and voltage-level node.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T 19964-2024与GB/T 37408可作为并网合规的技术基线，适用于条款对照，但塞尔维亚并网批准取决于每个项目在AERS和EMS路径中的具体要求及电压节点。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T 19964-2024與GB/T 37408可作為併網合規技術基線，適用於條款對照，但塞爾維亞併網批准取決於每個項目在AERS和EMS路徑中的具體要求及電壓節點。

gap.en: The gap is Serbian project acceptance, not frequency only. Exporters should provide single-line diagrams, protection tables, voltage and frequency limits, remote control settings, reconnection logic, commissioning records, and Serbian-language operating documents for the Serbian project owner and operator.
gap.zh: 差距在于塞尔维亚项目验收，而非仅频率差异。出口商应向塞尔维亚项目业主和运营方提供单线图、保护参数表、电压和频率限值、远程控制设置、重连逻辑、调试记录及塞尔维亚语运行文件。
gap.zht: 差距在於塞爾維亞項目驗收，而非僅頻率差異。出口商應向塞爾維亞項目業主和營運方提供單線圖、保護參數表、电壓和頻率限值、遠端控制設定、重連邏輯、調試記錄及塞爾維亞語運行文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for projects that seek AERS/EMS connection approval and distribution-level acceptance; acceptance is project- and operator-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China project acceptance documents do not transfer to Serbian grid approval

source.publisher: Energy Agency of the Republic of Serbia (AERS); Elektromreža Srbije (EMS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat AERS and EMS connection review as a Serbia project approval path separate from product compliance; do not present China grid acceptance as Serbia interconnection authorization.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将AERS和EMS连接审查视为塞尔维亚项目批准路径，独立于产品合规；不得将中国并网验收文件表述为塞尔维亚并网授权。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將AERS和EMS連接審查視為塞爾維亞項目批准路徑，獨立於產品合規；不得將中國併網驗收文件表述為塞爾維亞併網授權。
